privileged_info_summary: This task creates a synthetic interactive HR form based on a draft ODT document (/home/ga/Documents/onboarding_draft.odt) generated by setup_task.sh using Python's odf library. The task requires inserting exactly 2 Text Boxes (Full Name, Job Title), 1 Date Field (Start Date), 2 Radio Buttons (Full-Time/Part-Time with identical Group Name for mutual exclusivity), and 1 Checkbox (Company Laptop Required). The completed form must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/onboarding_form_interactive.odt. Verification uses ODF XML parsing to count and validate form controls by their standard tags (form:text, form:date, form:radio, form:checkbox).
